name: zymtrace
description: Detect and optimize CPU and GPU workload bottlenecks with zymtrace continuous profiling — analyze flamegraphs through the MCP, plus install, upgrade, expose, and troubleshoot the platform.

interface.longDescription: Install, upgrade, expose, and troubleshoot the zymtrace continuous profiling platform, and analyze CPU/GPU flamegraphs through the zymtrace MCP to find and fix workload bottlenecks.
defaultPrompt: Use zymtrace to analyze the GPU flamegraph over the last 1 hour and suggest solutions.
Use zymtrace to install the backend on my Kubernetes cluster.
Use zymtrace to find out why no profiles are showing up in the UI.
